scripts.build:packages: pnpm --filter @loom-dev/preview-runtime build && pnpm --filter @loom-dev/preview-engine build && pnpm --filter @loom-dev/preview build && pnpm --filter @loom-dev/cli build
scripts.build: pnpm run build:native && pnpm run build:packages && pnpm --filter @loom-dev/preview-harness build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run build:native && pnpm --filter @loom-dev/preview-runtime build && pnpm --filter @loom-dev/preview-engine build && pnpm --filter @loom-dev/preview-runtime typecheck && pnpm --filter @loom-dev/preview-engine typecheck && pnpm --filter @loom-dev/preview typecheck && pnpm --filter @loom-dev/cli typecheck && pnpm exec tsc -p apps/preview-harness/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: pnpm run build:native && pnpm exec vitest run
